Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class RecommendationResponse

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.RecommendationResponse
public class RecommendationResponse extends SObject

Java class for RecommendationResponse complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="RecommendationResponse">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ActionReference" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContextRecord" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContextRecordName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContextRecordType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OnBehalfOf" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OnBehalfOfName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OnBehalfOfType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecommendationKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecommendationName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecommendationType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Response" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StrategyReference" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StrategyVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
